mapper.select: SELECT * FROM semesters WHERE is_current = 1 AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM semesters WHERE semester_code = #{code} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM semesters WHERE academic_year = #{academicYear} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY semester_type
SELECT DISTINCT academic_year FROM semesters WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY academic_year DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE semesters SET is_current = 0 WHERE is_current = 1
mapper.select: SELECT id, semester_code, semester_name, academic_year, semester_type, start_date, end_date, is_current, status, description, created_at, updated_at FROM semesters WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT 1 FROM evaluation_periods WHERE semester_id = #{semesterId} AND deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM courses WHERE semester_id = #{semesterId} AND deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 1 FROM student_scores WHERE semester_id = #{semesterId} AND deleted = 0 ) t
